description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 2 reflection robustness.

Add checks for empty, malformed, or obviously lossy reflection output, including collapse of chronology, disappearance of current task state, or dropped completion/constraint information.
title: Detect degenerate or lossy reflector outputs before they replace useful observations
